entries.desc: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.
Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing 853 Cosmic damage.

Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.
Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.
Increases maximum Fury by 20.
The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.
Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.
Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing 104 Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.
Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.
Increases your chance to parry by 3%.
The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.
Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.
Shift gains an additional charge.
Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.
Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.
Mastery increases your movement speed.

Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.
Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.
Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer 4 Fire damage.
Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.
Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.
Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.
Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.
The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.
Increases maximum health by 3%.
Increases your mastery by 2.6%.
Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.
The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.
Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.
Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.
Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
Glide speed increased by 10%.
Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.
Blur gains 1 additional charge.

Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing 75 Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.1 sec.

Effect ends after 2.7 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.
Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for 24% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

Consume damage increased by 15%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.
The cooldown of Soul Immolation is reduced by 30 sec and it gains 1 additional charge.
Soul Immolation heals for an additional 4% of your health over its duration and its cooldown is reset upon killing an enemy that yields experience or honor.

Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Reap now generates 10 Fury.
Voidblade damage increased by 100% and Voidblade now generates 20 Fury.

While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, dealing 2,139 Cosmic damage to your target and 1,604 Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.
After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.
Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.

While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.
Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.
Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.
Soul Immolation generates an additional 12 Fury over its duration.

The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by 1 sec.

 Feast of Souls
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Reap gains an additional charge.
Reap's cooldown is reduced by your Haste.
Consume deals 10% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by 0.25 sec.
Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 2%.
Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by 2.0 sec.

After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for 6 sec.

 Hungering Slash
Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing 940 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating 10 Fury. Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional 570 Cosmic damage.
Your Mastery is increased by 2%.
Void Ray deals 80% more damage when damaging 3 targets.
Hungering Slash and Voidblade's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

Voidblade damage increased by 25%.

Hungering Slash deals 50% increased damage to its primary target.
Void Ray and Hungering Slash damage increased by 10%.
Reap and Consume damage increased by 10%.
After fully channeling Void Ray, gain 10 Fury.
When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain 5 Fury and increase your damage by 0.50% for 12 sec.

Collapsing Star reduces the cooldown of Voidblade by 10 sec.

Voidblade and The Hunt briefly reduce your Fury drain while in Void Metamorphosis.
Damage from Voidblade and the Hunt increases the damage your target takes from you by 12% for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by 30%.
Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.
Collapsing Star now generates 3 Soul Fragments.
Charge to your target, striking them for 2,285 Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 1,628 Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.
Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants 0.25% haste, up to 25%.

Void Metamorphosis requires 15 less souls.

Your Fury drains 25% faster while in Void Metamorphosis.

Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

 Eradicate
Slam your Scythe to the ground, dealing 2,558 Cosmic damage to your primary target and 2,558 to all other enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Eradicate gathers up to 4 nearby souls.
Collapsing Star always critically strikes.
The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.
Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,307 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.
Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.
While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.
Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.
Shift has 1 additional charge.

Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 674 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.
Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.
Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.
Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.
The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.
Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.
Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.
Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
Maximum Fury increased by 20.
Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,359 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.
Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.
Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.
Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.
